programme.title: Zoom In
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Yul Brynner returns as the good guy dressed in black who calls on five gunfighters (including Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins) to defend a town under siege by vicious outlaws.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Yul Brynner returns as the good guy dressed in black who calls on five gunfighters (including Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins) to defend a town under siege by vicious outlaws.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: The Cost Of A Dream: Indian Students In Germany
programme.desc: Studying in Germany is increasingly popular, especially among young Indians. But for some, high tuition can lead to financial difficulties. Then, attending classes and learning becomes less important than making money.

programme.title: Animal Invaders - The Battle Against Unwanted Species
programme.desc: Invasive species threaten flora and fauna and can destroy ecological balance. However, combating these dangerous invaders is costly and requires unusual measures.

programme.title: Uganda's Urban Water Fix: Low-Cost Tech That Cleans Groundwater
programme.desc: A low-cost technology is being used to purify groundwater and recycled wastewater in Uganda. Also: Urban Nigerians embrace sack farming.

programme.desc: Helen Toner, interim executive director at Georgetown's Center for Security and Emerging Technology and a former OpenAI board member, lays out how AI is moving from back-office support into the machinery of war. When AI helps shape deadly outcomes, who is responsible?

programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, Tomato changes colour.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.

programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E17 - Messy Breaks The Brakes
programme.desc: Messy accidentally removes the brakes from Mayor Oki's carnival float, but it turns out he really needs them. Will Messy be able to stop the runaway float?

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E10 - Recital
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: E10 - Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Freddie buries a pile of acorns into a small hole he's dug in Aunt Fee's garden. Aunt Fee is excited to go on a treasure hunt, but first needs to finish her map of the garden.

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - Fin-tastic Pals & Fun Shapes
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ as they meet the classroom goldfish, Flip, Flop & learn about shapes. Help an alligator learn to brush her teeth, quack & count like ducks then explore the letter G. Discover opposites like big & small with help from the Melon Learning Box & sing along to fun songs.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E61
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Dr. Coto's Clinic 2022
programme.desc: Shikina Island is a beautiful island located on the western edge of Japan. Kensuke Goto (Dr. Coto) came from Tokyo 19 years ago to this isolated island, 6 hours by ferry from the mainland. Since then, he has been the only doctor on the island and has borne the responsibility for the lives of all its residents. Over the years, the islanders have come to trust Coto, and Coto has come to trust them. He has become an irreplaceable presence and family member to all. A few years ago, he married Ayaka Hoshino, a nurse who has supported Coto for many years, and Ayaka is now seven months pregnant. Together with Ayaka's parents, Shoichi and Masayo, fisherman Gori Hara, former head fisherman Shigeo and his friends, Mariko, who runs a bar, and Wada, who helps out at the clinic, they live a peaceful life on the island. Now in 2022, Shikina Island, like many other rural areas in Japan, is experiencing depopulation and aging. Despite this somewhere in the back of their minds the islanders

programme.title: LAST MILE
programme.desc: On the day before the Black Friday sale, a box delivered by a global e-commerce company, explodes. The box was sent from one of the biggest warehouses, which has the three-quarter logistic shares around Tokyo. It leads a series of mysterious bombings that terrorize whole of Japan. Elena Funado, who was just appointed as a new director of the warehouse, is forced to control this unprecedented situation with a line manager, Ko Nashimoto. Who planted the bombs? For what purpose? How many bombs are left? - And where are they now? In this modern society, distribution service becomes critical need for our lives and that cannot be stopped. Can Elena and Ko end the serial bombings without stopping blood flowed in “blood vessel”; the global logistics system like a web?

programme.title: The Sleep Curse
programme.desc: During Japan's wartime occupation of Hong Kong in 1941-1945, a young translator's collaboration with the enemy results in his life being cursed by a murdered 'comfort woman' forced to become a sex slave. Forty-five years later, the man's sins come back to haunt his son, a professor specializing in sleeping disorders, when the lady's ghost returns for vengeance.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Cathedrals
programme.desc: If you want a cathedral, you'd better not be in a hurry! The construction site is a village in its own right, and lasts for several generations! Foreman Howler shows us round a medieval construction site, providing us with a 101 on cathedral-building techniques.

programme.title: Rock Around The Clock
programme.desc: While admiring the sea life in an ocean rock pool, Darwin & Newts discover that the water level is lowering. They try to stop the leak to save the creatures, but learn that they didn't need to worry.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.title: Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: When Mundi is startled by Fico's prank, she insists she isn't afraid of ghosts. They don't even exist! Oto and Anabella definitely believe in ghosts. Mundi vows to prove they don't, with a trip to a so-called ‘ghost town' in Tombstone, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: Eyeball Extravaganza!
programme.desc: The doctors reveal how eye muscles work with an unusual fairground game. Meet two new Ouchers, prepare to have your mind bent with an awesome trick to try at home, and find out who gets snotted in Ouchology!

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Fire Engine
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Fire Engine. It's his first day on the job and he's a little nervous when he gets a call about a cat stuck up a tree.

programme.title: Chukwuebuka and Chinonso (Kid Eche): Renowned Freestyle Footballer
programme.desc: Chinonso Eche and his coach, Chukwuebuka Ezugha, are both football freestylers who hold many GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS titles. They meet Alan Pixsley and teach him the basics of football freestyle.

programme.title: Second Annual Student Astronaut Contest
programme.desc: High school and college students compete for a fantastic prize: Going aboard a Zero-G aircraft where they'll experience microgravity with host, Emily Calandrelli. We'll see the student-winner try to execute a scientific experiment in weightlessness.

programme.title: Back on the Road
programme.desc: The Icicles are taking a huge risk and have choreographed a very ambitious routine. Charlie and Freddie are off to a competition in Guildford via Grandma's house for a sleepover. And a talented young skater from Russia has got everyone in a spin.

programme.title: Secret Message!
programme.desc: Eric learns that, with a little science, you can bring out all the colours that make up the black ink in felt tip markers. He separates the colours using chromatography. This gives him a way to write secret messages.

programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: Happy Bhaag Jaayegi
programme.desc: Happy, a vibrant Indian girl, elopes on the day of her wedding so that she can marry Guddu, the man of her dreams. Confusion ensues when she mistakenly arrives at the home of a Pak.2016

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile E432
programme.desc: Reet, a determined journalist, navigates the struggles of her 'atta-satta' marriage, uncovering family secrets and challenging societal norms in her quest for justice and true love.

programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E1 - The Gotthard Panorama Express, Between Lake Lucerne And Ticino
programme.desc: The legendary Gotthard Panorama Express links the German and Italian-speaking regions of Switzerland, via the historic Gotthard tunnel. Along the way the train offers impressive views of the sun-drenched landscapes and villages of Ticino.

programme.title: E1 - The Gotthard Panorama Express, Between Lake Lucerne And Ticino
programme.desc: The legendary Gotthard Panorama Express links the German and Italian-speaking regions of Switzerland, via the historic Gotthard tunnel. Along the way the train offers impressive views of the sun-drenched landscapes and villages of Ticino.

programme.title: E11 - Mathias Bensimon/Haider Ackermann/Salome Cousseau
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: E1 - Around Beef
programme.desc: Isabelle cooks two meals in one: beef ribs with creamy mashed potatoes, and pasta with braised beef and mushrooms.

programme.title: E66
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.desc: The semifinals wrap up in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to six challenging obstacles and race head-to-head for a spot in the national finals.

programme.title: E107 - The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: E1302 - Pups Save Teatime
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

E9
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E41
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E1 - Kasbah Tamadot, Morocco
programme.desc: Monica Galetti and Rob Rinder travel to Kasbah Tamadot in the Atlas Mountains of Morocco. With Sir Richard Branson as their boss, they discover how genuine Berber hospitality and spectacular views of the landscape make it unique.

programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and her crack team help a farming family transform their family home.

programme.title: E4 - Northern Ireland
programme.desc: In Northern Ireland, Rick has Filipino-style Sunday lunch and meets a 'no waste' chef turning an unpopular fish into a stunning dish. At home, he cooks beef and Guinness pie.

programme.title: E4 - Ceylon Tea Trails, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Monica and Rob travel to the highlands of central Sri Lanka to learn about Ceylon Tea Trails - a series of colonial era bungalows that have been renovated and revisioned by a local family of tea entrepreneurs. Monica works with the tea pickers and learns the importance of the industry to the country, while Rob tracks leopards in the surrounding plantations.

programme.desc: Amanda and Alan divide and conquer as they renovate the bathrooms. Amanda has big plans for converting one of the medieval tower rooms into a double-height sumptuous en-suite.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2E5 -I Wish I Could Just Spend Time With Her
programme.desc: A new wish leads Ruby to reunite a family.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1E8 -Rapunzel
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg really lets her hair down as Zenobia, the Hoodoo Diva, who keeps Rapunzel locked in a high tower in the bayou.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2E11 -Moonlighting
programme.desc: Rex teams up with a pair of Providence Academy dropouts in their freelance EVO-busting business.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E11 -Michael's Santa Monica
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E11 -Michael's Santa Monica
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E2 - Slammin' Salmon
programme.desc: Join the frantic dash to cash in on July’s salmon run with the Stage 1 winners and some tough new recruits. Tag along on BigBoi's food-finding road trip, welcome QuadMom and RedBack to the feast, and see if BoldFace can keep her surviving cub safe.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E7 - 周筆暢「爆改」歌曲
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E12 - 刑事辯護律師來襲
programme.desc: 明星助力官繼續傾情加盟，通過快問快答揭秘明星不為人知的經歷和情感往事，以獨特視角助陣男女嘉賓尋找真愛。以星素之間和代際之間的磁場碰撞，解讀當下年輕人的婚戀觀。
